caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and the BJP logos prominently displayed. The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a speaker, identified as the Prime Minister, is addressing the audience, gesturing with his hand to emphasize a point. He is dressed in traditional attire, wearing an orange turban and a shawl with the Indian tricolor. On the right, a group of attendees, also dressed in similar traditional attire with orange turbans and tricolor scarves, are seated and attentively listening to the speech. The setting appears formal and celebratory, with a backdrop featuring repeated BJP logos and the party's name. The overall atmosphere suggests a significant political gathering, likely aimed at commemorating the party's establishment and its achievements.
